# ASL Glove — Claude Session Notes

## Generated Files

These files were created by Claude analysis sessions and can be deleted and regenerated at any time.

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `schematic_analysis.json` | Schematic analyzer output (analyze_schematic.py) |
| `pcb_analysis.json` | PCB analyzer output (analyze_pcb.py --full) |
| `emc_analysis.json` | EMC pre-compliance analysis (analyze_emc.py) |
| `design_review.md` | Full design review report |
| `datasheets/MPU-6050.pdf` | InvenSense MPU-6050 datasheet |
| `datasheets/ESP32-C3_datasheet.pdf` | Espressif ESP32-C3 datasheet |
| `datasheets/index.json` | Datasheet sync manifest |
